description: Legal fragment. In the late hand of Hillel b. ʿEli (fl. 1066-1108) or the early hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100-1138 CE). [...] b. Abū l-Faḍl Ibn al-Dhahabī asks to hand over the document to Karīma known as al-Wuḥsha al-Dallāla, described in l. 5 as the divorcee of Arye b. Yehuda. See Med Soc III, ch. IX, C, 1, no. 85. (Information from Goitein's index card and CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-11 מפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
